diffs.diff:
--- a/explore_data.py
+++ b/explore_data.py
@@ -0,0 +1,33 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env python3

+import numpy as np

+import os

+

+data_dir = "/data"

+print("Data directory contents:")

+for f in os.listdir(data_dir):

+    print(f"  {f}")

+

+# Load training data

+train_data = np.load(os.path.join(data_dir, "train.npy"))

+val_data = np.load(os.path.join(data_dir, "val.npy"))

+adj_mx = np.load(os.path.join(data_dir, "adj_mx.npy"))

+

+print(f"\nTraining data shape: {train_data.shape}")

+print(f"Validation data shape: {val_data.shape}")

+print(f"Adjacency matrix shape: {adj_mx.shape}")

+

+print(f"\nTraining data stats:")

+print(f"  Min: {train_data.min():.2f}, Max: {train_data.max():.2f}")

+print(f"  Mean: {train_data.mean():.2f}, Std: {train_data.std():.2f}")

+

+print(f"\nValidation data stats:")

+print(f"  Min: {val_data.min():.2f}, Max: {val_data.max():.2f}")

+print(f"  Mean: {val_data.mean():.2f}, Std: {val_data.std():.2f}")

+

+print(f"\nAdjacency matrix stats:")

+print(f"  Min: {adj_mx.min():.2f}, Max: {adj_mx.max():.2f}")

+print(f"  Non-zero elements: {(adj_mx > 0).sum()} / {adj_mx.size}")

+

+# Show sample of adjacency matrix

+print(f"\nSample of adjacency matrix (first 10x10):")

+print(adj_mx[:10, :10])
